name: Sweet Fried Rice with Almonds and Cinnamon
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the mixed dried fruit in water with 2 teaspoons of vanilla extract for 40 minutes.
2. Heat peanut oil in a wok over moderate heat. Add almonds and stir-fry until toasted, about 1 minute. Remove almonds with a slotted spoon.
3. Reduce heat to moderate and add 2 tablespoons butter to the wok. Add onions and stir-fry until lightly browned.
4. Add 1/4 cup sugar and continue stirring-frying until caramelized. Add 1 teaspoon cinnamon, dried fruit mixture, and remaining vanilla extract. Stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove this mixture to a bowl.
5. Return the rice to the wok and add salt to taste. Stir-fry until rice separates into individual grains and some grains are lightly toasted.
6. Push the rice up against the sides of the wok, create an indentation in the center, and pour in the fruit mixture. Mix gently.
7. Turn out onto a serving platter and garnish with toasted almonds. Sprinkle remaining cinnamon mixed with cloves on top.
8. Serve 4 portions.
